title: meliosma simplicifolia subsp. fruticosa
intro: Meliosma simplicifolia subsp. fruticosa, also known as the 'Tropical Meliosma' or 'Kamia', is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a shrub or small tree with medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Meliosma simplicifolia subsp. fruticosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally, depending on the specific condition being treated.
